title: CNZ-006 Zettai・Tai・Beauty・Sho・Woman Miraculous Virgin Akiko Suzuki Complete BEST - Suzuki Akishin
overview: This is the first omnibus of Akishin Suzuki, who received great acclaim for her miracle maiden debut in the absolute beautiful girl series! Includes all four corners from when I was still a virgin! It is a complete best full of images until a beautiful virgin wakes up to sex and starts to squirt!
